title: ActionPlan
description: A complete, policy-approved sequence of typed steps for a single user goal. The plan is immutable once approved — executors must not add, remove, or reorder steps. Natural language (transcript) must never appear in this object.

plan_id.description: UUID-derived unique identifier for this plan.

session_id.description: The AgentSession this plan belongs to.

goal.description: Short structured description of the user goal. Must NOT be a raw transcript. Example: 'Send WhatsApp message to +1-555-0100 with text: meeting at 3pm'.

app_package.description: Primary target package, e.g. 'com.whatsapp'. Must appear in the session's PolicyConfig.allowed_packages.

steps.description: Ordered list of steps. Executor processes them one at a time, never in batch.

version.description: Schema version, incremented on breaking changes to the plan format.

created_at.description: ISO-8601 UTC timestamp when the plan was compiled.
